quote: During her cooperation with our Foundation, Julia has proven to be an outstanding professional, characterized by great empathy, optimism, and a strong commitment to helping others.
longQuote: During her cooperation with our Foundation, Julia has proven to be an outstanding professional, characterized by great empathy, optimism, and a strong commitment to helping others. She consistently demonstrates a high level of engagement in all assigned tasks, performing them with responsibility and dedication.
name: Agnieszka Pleti
